import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)

  mut result: List<String> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    result = list.push(result, tok)
    result = list.push(result, tok)
    i = i + 1
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut j = 0
  while j < result.len()
    let tok = match result.get(j)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    if j == 0
      out = tok
    else
      out = "#{out} #{tok}"
    end
    j = j + 1
  end

  print(out)
end
